description: Create a custom interactive search dashboard for clinical guidelines. Create a tiddler titled 'Active Guidelines Search' tagged 'Dashboard' that provides a search interface. The interface must include a text input field bound to the state tiddler '$:/state/guideline-search' and a button to reset that state to an empty string. The dashboard must display a dynamic list of clickable links for all tiddlers tagged both 'ClinicalGuideline' and 'Active' that match the current search query in '$:/state/guideline-search'. Ensure the search results exclude meeting minutes and archived guidelines.
